zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Childe於大約1412年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾諾維其可時，他的父親Thomas Childe28歲，母親Dorthina23歲。他於1431年與Elizabeth在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1459年在英國武斯特斯爾諾維其可享年48歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾諾維其可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Childe于大约1412年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾諾維其可时，他的父亲Thomas Childe28岁，母亲Dorthina23岁。他于1431年与Elizabeth在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾伍斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1459年在英国武斯特斯爾諾維其可享年48岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾諾維其可。

nameMeanings.name: Childe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Child
meanings: nickname from Middle English child ‘child, infant’ (Old English cild), in various possible applications. The word is found in Old English as a byname, and in Middle English as a widely used affectionate term of address. It was also used as a term of status for a young man of noble birth, although the exact meaning is not clear; in the 13th and 14th centuries it was a technical term used of a young noble awaiting elevation to the knighthood. In other cases it may have been applied as a byname to a youth considerably younger than his brothers or to one who was a minor on the death of his father.
in Kent, possibly a topographic name from Old English cielde ‘spring (water)’, a rare word derived from c(e)ald ‘cold’.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Childe was born about 1412, in Northwick, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Childe, was 28 and his mother, Dorthina, was 23. He married Elizabeth in 1431, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1459, in Northwick, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Northwick, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Childe est né environ 1412, à Northwick, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Childe, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Dorthina, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth en 1431, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1459, à Northwick, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Northwick, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Childe um 1412 in Northwick, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Childe 28 und seine Mutter Dorthina 23. Er hat 1431 in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1459 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Northwick, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Northwick, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Childe è nato il circa 1412 nel Northwick, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Childe, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Dorthina, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth nel 1431, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1459, nel Northwick, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Northwick, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Childeが約1412年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアノースウィックで生まれた時，父Thomas Childeは28歳，母Dorthinaは23歳であった。1431年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターでElizabethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1459年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアノースウィックで48歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアノースウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Childe(이)가 대략 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 노르스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Childe(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorthina(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1431년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 Elizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1459년 영국 워스스터실르 노르스윅에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 노르스윅에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Childe nasceu aproximadamente 1412, em Northwick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Childe, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Dorthina, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth em 1431, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1459, em Northwick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Northwick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Childe родился около 1412 г. в местности нортвикк, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Childe было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorthina, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth в 1431 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1459 г. в местности нортвикк, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности нортвикк, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Childe nació aproximadamente 1412, en Northwick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Childe, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Dorthina, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elizabeth en 1431, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1459, en Northwick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Northwick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
